PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEFANIDIS,GUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KUMANA,SOROSH- SAINT FRANCIS TERRACE NO DAMAGES AVAILABLE WHERE PLTF DOES NOT VACATE UNIT. ALSO NEW LANDLORD HAVE DELIGENTLY WORKED TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
